title: CLARKSONS PLATOU HELLAS - SnP WEEKLY BULLETIN
section_path: CLARKSONS PLATOU HELLAS - SnP WEEKLY BULLETIN
section_path_text: CLARKSONS PLATOU HELLAS - SnP WEEKLY BULLETIN
summary:
Main
New building in tankers this week, Euronav ordered one firm 319k dwt VLCC at Qingdao Beihai, with the vessel set to deliver in Q4 2026 bringing their series to three
Source: Clarkson Platou (Hellas) ltd
